string.text:
An evolution of the earlier IZh-81 pump action shotgun, the MP-133 was intended for civilian and security markets as a reliable and practical hunting and self-defence weapon.
 
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] Origin: %c[ui_gray_2]Russia
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]Izhmekh Mechanical Plant

The first semi-automatic shotgun designed and manufactured by the Izhevsk Mechanical Plant, the MP-153 is one of the most popular semi-automatic shotguns of Russian origin and is widely used for various game hunting. Developed alongside the pump action MP-133 shotgun, it shares many of its parts and is known for its reliability and solid, heavy construction.
 
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] Origin: %c[ui_gray_2]Russia
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]Izhmekh Mechanical Plant

The first semi-automatic shotgun designed and manufactured by the Izhevsk Mechanical Plant, the MP-153 is one of the most popular semi-automatic shotguns of Russian origin and is widely used for various game hunting. Developed alongside the pump action MP-133 shotgun, it shares many of its parts and is known for its reliability and solid, heavy construction. The "Carabineer" includes a muzzle break and Picatinny rail.
 
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] Origin: %c[ui_gray_2]Russia
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]Izhmekh Mechanical Plant

At its core, the KS-23 is a manually-actuated, pump-action "shotgun" that fires unique 23mm shells. Though, while displaying an appearance more akin to a shotgun, the Russians designated the KS-23 as a "Special Carbine" due to its large-caliber rifled barrel when compared to the standard smoothbore barrels of conventional shotguns. The Vorkuta is a bigger version of the KS-23, featuring both a slimmed down 700mm barrel and pistol grip in pleace of the stand buttstock. The "Vorkuta" features a threaded barrel for introduction of a suppressor and attachable PU scope for better range combats. The weapon name suggests its origin might be from the city under the same name.
 
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] origin: %c[ui_gray_2]Soviet Union
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]Tula Arms Plant
 %c[d_orange] • %c[0,255,255,255] Extended tube, attachable Silencer and PU scope
